body_txt: This trope is frequently used in animated media meant for younger viewers to show the target has been incapacitated without injuring or killing them. Their clothes may or may not be affected; sometimes they really are Pinned to the Wall , and other times they can simply walk away, leaving a noticeably person-shaped silhouette of projectiles on the wall. Contrast William Telling . Related to the Inverse Law of Sharpness and Accuracy and, if the target is pinned, an inversion of the Inverse Law of Utility and Lethality . If intentional, usually requires Improbable Aiming Skills . Usually the end result of a Knife-Throwing Act . Sub-Trope of Near Misses (peak tension is achieved by a character almost getting hit by a projectile).
